ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "plate_number" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle's owner */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "registered_state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle is registered */,
  "registered_city" TEXT /* City where the vehicle is registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking location */,
  "x_coord" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the parking location */,
  "y_coord" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the parking location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parking location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the parking location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of parking spots available */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the parking location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the parking location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking location manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_spots" (
  "spot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking spot */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking location the spot belongs to */,
  "rot" INTEGER /* Rotation of the parking spot (e.g., 0, 90, 180, 270) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the spot (e.g., available, occupied) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of spot (e.g., compact, large, handicapped) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level or floor of the parking spot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_spots_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES parking_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the owner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the owner */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the owner */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being parked */,
  "spot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parking spot being used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the parking session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the parking session */,
  "parking_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the parking session in minutes */,
  "fee_paid" TEXT /* Amount of parking fee paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the parking session */,
  "is_overdue" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the vehicle has exceeded its allowed parking time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_records_spot_id FOREIGN KEY ("spot_id") REFERENCES parking_spots ("spot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
